node.text:
Jordan Peterson #men #woman 

Follow @rudra.xe for more !!

Ignore 
Lana Del Rey, born Elizabeth Woolridge Grant in 1985, is a critically acclaimed American singer-songwriter renowned for her cinematic, melancholic music that explores themes of tragic romance, glamour, and 1950s-1970s Americana.

Rising to fame with the viral 2011 hit "Video Games" and her 2012 major-label debut Born to Die, she has established herself as a significant influence on 21st-century pop music. Known for her sultry vocals and nostalgic aesthetic, Del Rey has earned numerous accolades, including multiple Grammy nominations and recognition from Rolling Stone as one of the greatest songwriters of her time.
He’s trying to explode the interviewer with his truecel rage
I don’t even know any female authors 💀
@aryanrgurzar Maybe educate yourself on some, there are many actually
@aryanrgurzar J.K Rowling is all I know
@lara.zn12 Every time he cries, its during discussions about how mamy broken people there are in society, its out of empathy.
@idontthinkthatsphilosophy his one of the greatest minds on this planet. You needa stop giving your opinion
@lara.zn12 the video is edited, he immediately mentioned a Canadian author
This is fake. He immediately answered Margaret Lawrence
Legend has it that he’s still thinking.
@thalassophiles._.satvk Frankstein, Harry Potter, kill a mocking board
it is because there are so many of them and he just can’t choose one because they are all awesome
@pancakes_1208 it is sad that you have become like this because of degradation of men in the west
he answers in the actual interview btw
@perpetually_loveless that is not what he said
@afreeman111 yeah i’m aware it’s a joke…
@recovering_trapaholic she a trans ⚧️ so still a male
this is edited he said the female author after a few seconds
@mister_freak_junior How much time are we looking at exactly? "A few" is pretty vague; it could be 2 seconds or 4, which is a significant difference in this context. Please clarify.
He could have so easily said Ayn Rand
@michaelfrancisdailey3 he did respond this is an edit
he was going to say Umera Ahmad
@filippomarcian bro can you try and find a song for me? Its on another post
@kjb04 he is a goat in sheep's clothing.
Why did you all edit this video ? He said Margaret Lawrence !
